title: Dotted function reference causes Internal Error

features.name: dotted function call on instance array member with signal argument
features.description: Code should include a dotted function call on an instance array member using a non-constant (signal) argument

features.name: bind statement with instance array
features.description: Code should include a bind statement that creates an array of instances bound to another module

features.name: function call via instance hierarchy with constant vs non-constant argument
features.description: Code should include dotted function calls through instance hierarchy where a constant argument works but a signal argument causes internal error
